common.tagline: The safe way to find an integration aide for your child
common.offline: No internet connection — some actions are unavailable

legal.privacyBeta: Beta version — full document will be published before public launch.
legal.privacyBody: Together collects technical identifiers (phone, check-in location) and usage data for matching and operations. No data is sold to third parties. Child data is protected by RLS and tiered access.
legal.termsBeta: Beta version — for invited testers only.
legal.termsBody: By using the app you agree to the terms of service to be published. Only verified professionals can receive requests. Parents control child profile publishing and access permissions.

admin.queueEmpty: Queue is empty — all caught up ✓
admin.bioContactWarning: Phone/email patterns detected in bio — verify no contact details

checklist.criminal_record_valid: Background check valid with no relevant record
checklist.bio_no_contact: Bio has no contact details (platform bypass)

admin.approveLocked: Complete all checklist items before approving
admin.rejectSubtitle: Select a document and enter a rejection reason — the professional will see it
admin.rejectSuccess: Document rejected — professional will be notified
admin.webOnlySubtitle: System management is available in the browser only
admin.webOnlyBody: The admin area is browser-only. Open Together Admin via the project web URL (npx expo start --web) and sign in with an admin account.

staff.mineEmpty: Nothing assigned to you right now
staff.notAssigned: This case is not assigned to you. Go back and claim it from the pool.
staff.phoneHidden: Phone is revealed only after viewing all documents and submitting a rejection note.
staff.rejectGateHint: View all required documents before rejecting. Enter what is wrong or missing — then phone is revealed.
staff.webOnlyBody: Sign in via npx expo start --web with a supervisor or admin account.
staff.usersSearch: Search by name, phone, or area
staff.mfaBanner: Admin actions require 2FA — tap to set up
staff.mfaEnrollHint: Scan the QR in your authenticator app, then enter the code
staff.mfaVerifyHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your phone number

parentOnboarding.title: Let's get to know your child
parentOnboarding.subtitle: We'll record the initial details to find a matching professional

parent.homeSubtitle: Personalized matches based on your child's profile

parent.noChildProfile: No child profile yet — go to the Child profile tab
parent.childNotPublished: Child profile is not published — enable publishing to see matches
parent.matchesError: Could not load matches. Please try again.
parent.requestPrivacyNote: At this stage the professional sees only basic info (TIER 1). Full details unlock after mutual approval.
parent.requestMessagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your child and what you're looking for...
parent.requestMessageRequired: Please write a message before sending
parent.requestSentDesc: The professional will receive your request and can respond soon
parent.publishProfileDesc: A published profile is required to receive matches
parent.childFormInvalid: Please enter a valid name and age (1–21)
parent.approveConfirm: Once approved, an active match will be created with the professional.
parent.detailsPrivacyNote: Sensitive information. Shown only to a professional with an active approved match.
parent.diagnosisPlaceholder: Full description, year of diagnosis, treating clinicians...
parent.whatWorksPlaceholder: Approaches and tools that help the child succeed
parent.whatTriggersPlaceholder: Situations or stimuli that create difficulty (noise, schedule changes...)
parent.winDefinitionPlaceholder: What would a successful day look like for you?
parent.notesPlaceholder: Anything else important for the professional to know
parent.introNotReady: Contact details will be available after intro approval
parent.disclosureSubtitle: Before continuing with {{name}} — this information will be shared:

professional.homeSubtitle: New parent requests and ongoing work
professional.browseSubtitle: Available child cards in your area
professional.notVerified: Only verified professionals can browse child cards
professional.noChildren: No available child cards in your area right now
professional.documentsSubtitle: Upload documents required to verify your profile
professional.noDocuments: You haven't uploaded any documents yet
professional.todayCheckinTitle: Good morning — arrived at the framework?
professional.todayCheckinDesc: Tap to check in. Location is verified within 100 meters.
professional.todayQuestionnaireDesc: Fill a quick log — {{name}}'s parent will get a summary
professional.pendingBody: We'll update you within 2 business days. Meanwhile, complete your profile and upload documents.
professional.pendingRejected: Some documents were rejected. Re-upload per the notes and we'll resubmit for review.
professional.pendingSubmitted: Documents submitted for review. We'll update you within 2 business days.
professional.pendingSla: Estimated review time: up to 2 business days
professional.documentsSubmitted: Documents submitted for review. We'll notify you soon.
professional.documentsReadySubmit: All required documents uploaded. Submitting for review automatically.
professional.documentsRequiredHint: Upload 3 documents: ID, background check, and professional certificate.

activeMatch.title: Active match

activeMatch.endConfirm: End this match? You'll be able to rate the experience afterwards.
activeMatch.endHelp: You'll be able to submit a rating after ending
activeMatch.checkinDescription: Tap to check in at the framework. Location is verified within 100 meters.
activeMatch.aiEmpty: No insights yet — they'll appear after the first daily log
activeMatch.logFormSubtitle: Fill in the details to support the child's progress
activeMatch.metricSocialDesc: How many times the child initiated social interaction (0–5)
activeMatch.metricRegulationDesc: Ability to cope with difficulty and emotions (0 = very hard, 5 = excellent)
activeMatch.metricParticipationDesc: Level of engagement in class/group activities (0–5)
activeMatch.notesPlaceholder: What stood out today? What worked? What was challenging?...
activeMatch.aiPreparing: Summary is being prepared — check back soon
activeMatch.trendInsufficient: Chart appears after at least 3 logged days
activeMatch.selectMetricsHint: Pick 3 metrics the professional will log daily

reviews.title: Rate the match
reviews.subtitle: Your rating helps other parents choose wisely
reviews.textPlaceholder: What stood out? Any praise or notes?...
reviews.emptyForProfessional: No reviews yet for this professional
reviews.blindNotice: Your rating stays hidden until the other party rates too, or after 14 days.
reviews.blindHidden: Rating saved. It will be revealed when the other party rates as well.
reviews.alreadySubmitted: You already submitted a rating for this match.

permissions.title: Permissions & control
permissions.subtitle: What {{name}} sees in the file

permissions.pauseConfirm: The professional won't access the file until you restore access
